content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market under pressure with Nifty -1.15%, Bank Nifty -1.48%, Realty -2.42%, PSU Banks -2.03%, and India VIX spiking +10.27% to 18.57 — risk-off tape. IT (+0.01%) and Pharma (-0.28%) holding up as defensive pockets; FMCG names with Q4 beats (MARICO, TATACONSUM) and select capital goods (THERMAX, POLYCAB) showing relative strength on stock-specific catalysts. Existing book is well-diversified across defensives; management-side trailing on winners (COFORGE +10%) is the priority, with selective adds only on highest-conviction setups.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23700,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COFORGE at +10% with CMP 1385. Current SL 1355.44 is already above entry (good). Trail-gap discipline: SL needs to sit ≥1% below LTP (1385 × 0.99 = 1371.15 max). Setting SL 1340 keeps the 3.3% gap from CMP — room for normal IT volatility while locking in ~6.4% gain. Q4 beat + Cigniti merger May 16 + multiple broker upgrades (PL Rs 2,020, Axis Rs 1,690) support raising target to 1450. New R:R from here: reward 65, risk 45 = 1.44, acceptable on a +10% winner being trailed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "MARICO +2.5%, CMP 836. Current SL at entry (820). Trailing SL to 825 locks in marginal gain above entry, gap to CMP ~1.3% — within trail-gap discipline. Q4 beat (rev +22%, PAT +14%) + FMCG sector leadership today + record high momentum justifies hold. Target unchanged at 855."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF -1.1% on intraday profit-booking, but VIX spiking and macro risk-off keeps gold as portfolio hedge. SL 121 intact, still 2.2% below CMP — let position run with current SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pidilite -3% with SL 1465 only 1.4% below CMP 1444. Rule 17 discipline: SL is doing its job. Q4 was strong (PAT +36.6%, EBITDA margin +280bps, UVG 15.3%) — thesis intact. Crude pressure is a known overhang priced in at entry. Hold to SL; do not preempt."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Wockpharma -0.7%, SL 1600 just below CMP 1598.90 (essentially at SL). Q4 beat (EBITDA +147% YoY) and pharma sector at 52w high. Rule 17: SL placed at entry intent — let it fire if it must, do not preempt the stop. Recovery option intact if pharma momentum resumes."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SRF +1.0%, SL 2735 = 2.4% below CMP. Q4 PAT +47% FY26, chemicals 15-20% growth guidance, refrigerants Rs 2,300 cr capex. Too early to trail — need >2% gain. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Polycab flat, SL 9020 just 0.4% below CMP 9059 — tight already. Q4 record revenue +27%, Rs 47/share dividend, Citi target Rs 10,500. Hold to SL or target; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ABCAPITAL -3.1%, CMP 353 vs SL 354 — already at/just below SL. Rule 17: let the SL fire if it must. Q4 PAT +31% YoY, lending AUM +27%, NBFC tailwinds from rate cuts. Not exiting preemptively; the SL was placed to absorb exactly this volatility."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Bajaj-Auto -1.8%, SL 10440 = 1.3% below CMP 10563. Q4 PAT +103%, Rs 150 dividend, Rs 5,633 cr buyback at Rs 12,000 (premium to CMP) provides structural floor. Thesis very intact. Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Dabur -2.2%, SL 472 just 0.7% below CMP 475.4. Q4 PAT +15%, rural growth +350bps faster than urban. Sub-par revenue growth (5.17%) is the overhang but priced in. Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1228.00,
      "new_target": 1290.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Laurus +1.9%, near 52w high. SL at entry (1226); trailing to 1228 to lock breakeven, gap to CMP 1241 ~1.1% — within trail-gap discipline. FY26 PAT +148%, CDMO +36%, pharma sector at 52w high. Target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 40,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1248.00,
      "stop_loss": 1198.00,
      "target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "TATACONSUM Q4 beat: PAT +21.5%, revenue +17.9%, op margin +111bps to 14.58%, Foods +21%, non-branded +41%, Rs 10 dividend. Gap-up breakout to 52w high on FMCG sector strength (Nifty FMCG leading). Crude-insulated domestic consumption play — appropriate defensive add for cautious tape. Entry near CMP 1250, SL 1198 = -4% (within risk budget for ~5% position), target 1330 = +6.6%. R:R = 82/50 = 1.64. Position size: 40 × 1248 = Rs 49,920 = ~5% of capital. Sector: FMCG already has MARICO + DABUR but combined under 15% — within cap."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "THERMAX",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Thermax +11.85% gap-up to fresh 52w high on Q4 results + Rs 20 dividend. +38% in 1 month signals rally is extended; intraday already faded from 4880 high to 4678 (-4.1% from high). Chasing post-result gap-ups at extended levels is the failure mode. Watchlist for pullback to 4400-4500 range."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "COFORGE_NEW",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Already held with +10% gain, just trailed. No new entry needed; would breach concentration on a single name."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PERSISTENT",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Persistent +2.2%, but trading ~27% below 52w high — relative weakness vs COFORGE. Already have COFORGE as IT exposure; adding second mid-cap IT would be cluster concentration. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "NTPC Q4 results May 15 — binary catalyst within 3 sessions (Rule 11). Default disposition: do NOT open fresh CNC position into earnings. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HCLTECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Not in eligible deep-dive batch data; skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INFY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Not in deep-dive data; already have COFORGE for IT exposure."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Not in deep-dive data; pharma exposure already via WOCKPHARMA + LAURUSLABS."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Not in deep-dive data; insufficient info to size entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Not in deep-dive data."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BERGEPAINT",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results May 12 — binary event next session (Rule 11). Do not enter before binary. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Not in deep-dive data; pharma exposure adequate."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Not in deep-dive data."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "reasoning": "HFCL MIS BUY LIMIT 133.50 placed 7522 minutes ago (~5 days) — stale order, thesis context lost, MIS product on a multi-day-old order makes no sense. Cancel to clear book hygiene."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Hedge value intact, SL 121 holds 2.2% below CMP."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 825.00, "reasoning": "Trail to lock marginal gain above entry; FMCG sector leader on Q4 beat."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1340.00, "reasoning": "+10% winner; tighten SL while preserving 3.3% gap from CMP. Raise target to 1450 on broker upgrades."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Respecting SL 1465; thesis intact, do not preempt."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "At SL; Rule 17 — let it fire if it must, pharma sector momentum supportive of recovery."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Too early to trail; Q4 strong, hold to SL/target."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already tight, thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "At/near SL — respect the stop, don't preempt."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 +103%, buyback floor at Rs 12,000 — strong thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Near SL; respect stop."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1228.00, "reasoning": "Lock breakeven above entry on pharma sector 52w high momentum."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "THERMAX: monitor for pullback to 4400-4500 zone before considering entry — current gap-up extended. NTPC: revisit post Q4 results May 15. BERGEPAINT: revisit post Q4 May 12. PERSISTENT: needs to clear above 5300 to confirm trend reversal vs current mid-range trade.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 45%, room to ~80%. After TATACONSUM add (~5%), deployment reaches ~50%. Cautious tape with VIX +10% and broad Nifty -1.15% argues against aggressive adds; one quality FMCG breakout entry on Q4 beat is appropriate. Existing book is well-balanced across FMCG (MARICO/DABUR/+TATACONSUM), Pharma (WOCKPHARMA/LAURUSLABS), Chemicals (SRF/PIDILITIND), IT (COFORGE), Auto (BAJAJ-AUTO), Capital Goods (POLYCAB), Financials (ABCAPITAL), and Gold ETF hedge — no single sector >20%. Rule 17 discipline applied to 4 positions trading near SL (PIDILITIND/WOCKPHARMA/ABCAPITAL/DABUR) — letting SLs fire if needed rather than preempting. Two winners trailed (COFORGE/MARICO/LAURUSLABS) per trail-gap discipline."
}
